title.en: Is Soy Sauce Kosher? Common Asian Ingredients Under the Halachic Microscope
title.zh: 酱油符合犹太洁食吗?常见亚洲食材的犹太教法审视
title.he: האם רוטב סויה כשר? מרכיבים אסייתיים נפוצים תחת המיקרוסקופ ההלכתי

description: A detailed guide to the kosher status of soy sauce, rice vinegar, miso, tofu, nori, and other Asian staples.
author: Torah Light Project
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers, no background in Judaism
cultural_parallels: Han Dynasty fermentation techniques vs. Second Temple period
Zhou Dynasty seaweed usage vs. Judges period
Chinese kitchen adaptation for kosher cooking
